ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the employee belongs to */,
  "mgr_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee's manager */,
  "job_id" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current employment status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the employee */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the employee */,
  "children_count" INTEGER /* Number of children of the employee */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the employee's photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_mgr_id FOREIGN KEY ("mgr_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "dept_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Manager responsible for the department */,
  "dept_head_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the department */,
  "budget" REAL /* Annual budget allocated to the department */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the department */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jobs" (
  "job_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each job title */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Title of the job */,
  "min_salary" REAL /* Minimum salary for the job */,
  "max_salary" REAL /* Maximum salary for the job */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the job responsibilities */,
  "required_skills" TEXT /* Skills required for the job */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Minimum years of experience required for the job */,
  "hiring_manager_id" INTEGER /* Manager responsible for hiring for the job */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_hiring_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("hiring_manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department managed by the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the manager */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance review */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance review */,
  "score" REAL /* Score awarded during the review */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or feedback provided */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee who conducted the review */,
  "review_type" TEXT /* Type of review (e.g., annual, mid-year) */,
  "review_period" TEXT /* Period covered by the review (e.g., Q1 2023) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit */,
  "benefit_name" TEXT /* Name of the benefit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the benefit */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for the benefit */,
  "cost_to_employer" REAL /* Cost of the benefit to the employer */,
  "cost_to_employee" REAL /* Cost of the benefit to the employee */,
  "benefit_type" TEXT /* Type of benefit (e.g., health, retirement) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_benefits" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the benefit the employee is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the employee enrolled in the benefit */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the benefit enrollment ends */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the benefit enrollment (e.g., active, expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id", "benefit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary change record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee whose salary changed */,
  "old_salary" REAL /* Previous salary before the change */,
  "new_salary" REAL /* New salary after the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the salary change occurred */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the salary change (e.g., promotion, performance) */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager who approved the salary change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_history_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_history_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "postcode" TEXT /* Postal code of the location */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the location */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email for the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "job_id" TEXT /* Reference to the job associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's responsibilities */,
  "required_certifications" TEXT /* Certifications required for the role */,
  "training_required" TEXT /* Training required for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments_roles" (
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the job role */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was assigned to the department */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was removed from the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dept_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., HR, manager, admin) */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or job title of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
